summary: SINGLE_FOCUS taxonomy diagram: 4 RoundedRectangle boxes for the four families — BLUE 'Cyclic Z_p of prime order', GREEN 'Alternating A_n (n≥5)', ORANGE 'Groups of Lie type (16 families)', RED '26 sporadic groups'. YELLOW Arrow from sporadic to a highlighted YELLOW 'Monster group M, |M|≈8×10^53' box. Bottom MathTex shows the full factorization of |M| (primes up to 71). YELLOW note connects moonshine to the j-function.
